products.name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Cancelling Headphones
products.description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with 30-hour battery life. Crystal-clear hands-free calling and Alexa built-in. Multipoint connection lets you pair to two Bluetooth devices simultaneously.

products.name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 Pressure Cooker 6Qt
products.description: Replaces 7 kitchen appliances: pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, sauté pan, yoghurt maker and warmer. Up to 70% faster than traditional cooking.

products.name: Premium Non-Slip Yoga Mat 6mm Thick
products.description: Extra-thick 6mm cushioning for joint support. Non-slip texture on both sides. Eco-friendly TPE material, sweat-resistant and easy to clean. Includes carry strap.

products.name: Kindle Paperwhite 16GB Waterproof E-Reader
products.description: Glare-free display that reads like real paper even in bright sunlight. Adjustable warm light. IPX8 waterproof — reads safely in the bath or by the pool. 10 weeks battery life.

products.name: Luxury Linen Duvet Cover Set Queen Size
products.description: 100% washed linen. Naturally breathable and temperature-regulating for year-round comfort. Pre-washed for a soft, relaxed feel from day one. Includes 2 pillowcases.

products.name: Ultrasonic Aromatherapy Essential Oil Diffuser
products.description: 400ml capacity runs up to 8 hours. 7 LED colour options and 4 timer settings. BPA-free, whisper-quiet ultrasonic technology. Auto shut-off when water runs out.

products.name: Lightweight Breathable Mesh Running Shoes
products.description: Engineered mesh upper for breathability and flexibility. EVA midsole for responsive cushioning. Rubber outsole with multi-directional traction. Available in sizes 4–12.

products.name: Atomic Habits — James Clear (Paperback)
products.description: The #1 New York Times bestseller. A proven framework for improving every day. James Clear reveals practical strategies that will teach you exactly how to form good habits, break bad ones.

products.name: 5.8Qt Digital Air Fryer XL Smart Touch
products.description: 1700W rapid air circulation cooks food 75% faster than conventional ovens. Digital touch screen with 8 presets. Non-stick dishwasher-safe basket. Up to 80% less fat than deep frying.

products.name: Blue Light Blocking Computer Glasses
products.description: Reduces digital eye strain from screens. UV400 protection. Lightweight TR90 frame. Suitable for men and women. Anti-reflective coating for clearer vision in artificial lighting.

products.name: Mechanical Keyboard TKL RGB Backlit
products.description: Tenkeyless layout saves desk space. Blue tactile switches. Per-key RGB lighting with 18 effects. USB-C detachable cable. N-key rollover for gaming.

products.name: 11-Piece Resistance Bands Full Set
products.description: Five resistance levels (10–50 lbs). Includes handles, ankle straps, door anchor and carry bag. Natural latex, anti-snap design. Suitable for physio, yoga and strength training.

products.name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle 1L Insulated
products.description: Triple-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks cold 24 hours, hot 12 hours. BPA-free food-grade stainless steel. Leakproof lid. Fits most cup holders. Dishwasher safe.

products.name: Wireless Charging Pad 15W Fast Charge
products.description: Compatible with iPhone 12/13/14/15, Samsung Galaxy S22/S23, AirPods. Intelligent chip prevents overheating. LED indicator. No cable fuss — just place and charge.

products.name: Scented Soy Candle Gift Set — 3 Pack
products.description: Hand-poured in the UK. Three fragrances: Lavender & Vanilla, Cedarwood & Amber, Fresh Linen. 40-hour burn time each. Cotton wicks, no soot. Perfect gift set.
